_comment: Copy this file to .claude/settings.local.json and fill in real values. The settings.local.json is gitignored — NEVER commit real credentials. Only dev-machine tier-2 credentials belong here (PATs, scoped API keys); production runtime secrets stay in Supabase Edge Function Secrets + Vercel Env Vars, not on your machine.

env._comment: These populate Claude Code's process env + are inherited by tools, MCP servers, and Bash subprocesses. Supabase MCP reads SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN from here via .mcp.json's ${SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN} expansion.
env._playwright_comment: Test-user credentials read by e2e/auth.setup.ts. Needed for Tier 3+ E2E runs per docs/testing-strategy.md. BASE_URL points at the Vercel preview URL of the PR under test, extracted from the Vercel bot comment. These accounts are assigned roles via migration 20260422210000_assign_bkennington_test_user_roles.sql.
env._skip_these_on_dev_machine_comment: Deliberately NOT included — these live in Supabase Edge Function Secrets / Vercel Env Vars only, not on developer machines: SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY, SUPABASE_DB_PASSWORD, SUPABASE_DB_URL, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET, RESEND_API_KEY, WEATHER_API_KEY, CRON_SECRET, GOOGLE_OAUTH_CLIENT_SECRET. If you need one of these ephemerally (e.g., for a one-time cutover or smoke test), paste it into a separate gitignored scratch file and delete after use.
